candidate.description: Combining multiple ranked lists by summing reciprocal ranks of each document; robust to score-scale mismatch between rankers.

l2s.scope_1line: Probabilistic lexical scoring with term saturation and length normalization.
Supervised ranking models combining many signals.

l1s.scope_1line: Searching documents by text content using inverted indices.
Grounding LLM responses with retrieved documents.
